news.title: Dollar at two-month high as Gulf hostilities flare, yen near intervention zone
news.description: Although Israel and ⁠Lebanon ⁠agreed to a ceasefire, a broader peace deal remained elusive, keeping oil prices elevated and supporting demand for the safe-haven ​dollar.

news.title: Nifty faces key resistance near 23,450 as markets await policy outcome, says Ajit Nayak

news.title: Gold Slips as Uncertainty Clouds Negotiations to End US-Iran War

news.title: Nestle Buys Out Yfood Founders in First Acquisition for New CEO
